context_core_build.stdout:
rm -rf build/gnu/ build/coral_reef.aplx tests/test_runtime tests/test_context_core tests/test_route_core tests/test_memory_core tests/test_learning_core tests/test_four_core_local tests/test_four_core_48event
mkdir -p build/gnu/src/
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /tmp/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_CONTEXT_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=4 -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -o build/gnu/src/main.o src/main.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /tmp/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_CONTEXT_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=4 -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -o build/gnu/src/state_manager.o src/state_manager.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /tmp/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_CONTEXT_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=4 -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -o build/gnu/src/host_interface.o src/host_interface.c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
PERL5LIB=/tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools:$PERL5LIB /tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkbuild coral_reef > build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /tmp/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_CONTEXT_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=4 -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1   -c -o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk elf
arm-none-eabi-gcc -T/tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools/sark.lnk -Wl,-e,cpu_reset -Wl,-static -ffreestanding -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--use-blx -nostartfiles -static -L /tmp/spinnaker_tools/lib build/gnu/src/main.o build/gnu/src/state_manager.o build/gnu/src/host_interface.o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o  /tmp/spinnaker_tools/lib/libspin1_api.a -o build/gnu/coral_reef.elf
arm-none-eabi-objdump -dxt > build/gnu/coral_reef.txt build/gnu/coral_reef.elf
arm-none-eabi-objcopy -O binary -j RO_DATA -j EX_DATA build/gnu/coral_reef.elf build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
arm-none-eabi-objcopy -O binary -j RW_DATA build/gnu/coral_reef.elf build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin
ls -l build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
-rwxr-xr-x  1 james  staff  11248 May  2 23:17 build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
PERL5LIB=/tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools:$PERL5LIB /tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkbin build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin > build/gnu/coral_reef.bin
rm -f build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin
arm-none-eabi-nm build/gnu/coral_reef.elf > build/gnu/coral_reef.nm
mkdir -p build/
PERL5LIB=/tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools:$PERL5LIB /tmp/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkaplx build/gnu/coral_reef.nm | cat - build/gnu/coral_reef.bin > build/coral_reef.aplx
rm build/gnu/coral_reef.bin build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c build/gnu/coral_reef.nm build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o

mcpl_test.stdout:
cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-int-to-pointer-cast -I stubs -I src -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_LEARNING_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=3 tests/test_mcpl_feasibility.c stubs/spin1_api.c src/state_manager.c -lm -o tests/test_mcpl_feasibility
./tests/test_mcpl_feasibility
=== Tier 4.27d MCPL Feasibility Tests ===

[1/5] MCPL key packing...
  PASS: app_id extracted correctly

  PASS: send_request seq_id is 7
  PASS: send_request payload is key_id
  PASS: send_request with_payload flag set

[3/5] MCPL lookup reply send...

  PASS: send_reply msg_type is REPLY
  PASS: send_reply lookup_type is MEMORY
  PASS: send_reply seq_id is 99
  PASS: send_reply payload is value
  PASS: send_reply with_payload flag set

[4/5] MCPL lookup receive extraction...
  PASS: receive compiles and runs

[5/5] Official Spin1API symbol compile...
